# DomyDomains

> The fastest domain name search tool on the internet. Search 400+ TLDs instantly.

DomyDomains is a domain availability search engine that checks hundreds of domain extensions in real-time. Find available domains, explore extensions, generate creative names, and discover premium aftermarket domains.

## Features

- Instant domain availability search across 400+ TLDs
- Two-phase loading: popular TLDs first, then all extensions
- Domain name generator with prefix/suffix variations
- Premium/aftermarket domain discovery
- 18+ blog articles on domains, SEO, and branding
- Mobile-first responsive design

## URLs

- Website: https://domydomains.com
- API: https://api.domydomains.com
- Search: https://domydomains.com/?q={query}

## API

The search API is available at:
- `GET https://api.domydomains.com/api/search/?q={name}&scope=all` — Search all TLDs
- `GET https://api.domydomains.com/api/search/?q={name}&scope=popular` — Search popular TLDs only
- `GET https://api.domydomains.com/api/suggestions/?q={name}` — Get name suggestions
- `GET https://api.domydomains.com/api/seo-articles/` — List all blog articles
- `GET https://api.domydomains.com/api/seo-articles/{slug}/` — Get full article by slug

## Agent Integration

DomyDomains is designed for AI agents and assistants. The search API is free, requires no authentication, and returns structured JSON. Agents can:
- Search domain availability: `GET /api/search/?q={name}&scope=all`
- Generate domain suggestions: `GET /api/suggestions/?q={name}`
- Read blog articles: `GET /api/seo-articles/{slug}/`
- Deep-link to results: `https://domydomains.com/?q={name}`
